nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Daedalea Dickinsii/Hydrolyzed Salmon Ovary Membrane Extract/Soluble Collagen/Sodium Hyaluronate Ferment Filtrate
chemicalDescription: Daedalea Dickinsii/Hydrolyzed Salmon Ovary Membrane Extract/Soluble Collagen/Sodium Hyaluronate Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Hydrolyzed Salmon Ovary Extract, Soluble Collagen and Sodium Hyaluronate by the fungus, Daedalea dickinsii.
cosmeticRestriction: Please consider whether entry 419 of Annex II to the Cosmetics Regulation 1223/2009 is applicable. According to entry 419, category 1 material and Category 2 material as defined in Articles 4 and 5 respectively of Regulation (EC) No 1774/2002, and ingredients derived therefrom are prohibited in cosmetics products. Regulation (EC) No 1774/2002 has been repealed and replaced by Regulation No. 1069/2009. For Category 1 and 2 materials in Regulation No. 1069/2009, please see Article 8 and 9, respectively.
inciName: DAEDALEA DICKINSII/HYDROLYZED SALMON OVARY MEMBRANE EXTRACT/SOLUBLE COLLAGEN/SODIUM HYALURONATE FERMENT FILTRATE
